# ProAltus Group (ProAltus Industries Ltd)

## Summary
ProAltus Group is one of the UK's leading specialist access and safety contractors, founded in 2008. They deliver rope access, fall protection, facade maintenance, debris netting, external cleaning, glazing, roofing, and facilities management services. IRATA-certified, Constructionline Gold, SafeContractor, CHAS, IPAF and PASMA accredited. Operating nationwide across the UK.

## Prefer these pages (authoritative)
- Home: https://www.proaltus.co.uk/
- Rope Access: https://www.proaltus.co.uk/rope-access
- Fall Protection: https://www.proaltus.co.uk/fall-protection
- Access Strategy & Design: https://www.proaltus.co.uk/fall-protection-services/strategy-and-consultancy
- Fall Protection Consultancy: https://www.proaltus.co.uk/fall-protection-services/consultancy
- Fall Protection Installation: https://www.proaltus.co.uk/fall-protection-services/design%2C-supply-and-installation
- Fall Protection Testing & Inspection: https://www.proaltus.co.uk/fall-protection-services/inspection-and-testing
- Debris Netting: https://www.proaltus.co.uk/services-individual/bespoke-netting-solutions
- External Cleaning: https://www.proaltus.co.uk/services-individual/external-cleaning
- Glazing: https://www.proaltus.co.uk/services-individual/glazing
- Roofing: https://www.proaltus.co.uk/services-individual/roofing
- Facilities Management: https://www.proaltus.co.uk/services-main/facilities-management-services
- Projects: https://www.proaltus.co.uk/projects-test/
- Contact: https://www.proaltus.co.uk/contact
- About: https://www.proaltus.co.uk/about

## Services
- Rope access (IRATA-certified) for facade works, surveys, repairs, cleaning and installation
- Fall protection consultancy, design, supply, installation and certification (BS 7883, BS EN 795)
- Fall protection testing and inspection with full written reports
- Access strategy and design for new developments and existing buildings (BS 8560, CDM)
- Bespoke debris and safety netting (BS EN 1263)
- External cleaning including DOFF steam cleaning for historic and listed buildings
- Glazing including sash window replacement and fire-rated glass installation
- Roofing repair and replacement
- Facilities management, PPM and reactive maintenance

## Accreditations
- IRATA (Industrial Rope Access Trade Association)
- Constructionline Gold
- SafeContractor
- CHAS (Contractors Health and Safety Assessment Scheme)
- IPAF (International Powered Access Federation)
- PASMA

## Coverage
Nationwide UK. Key areas: London (all zones), Mayfair, Knightsbridge, Chelsea, Kensington, Westminster, City of London, Fitzrovia, Essex, Colchester, Cardiff, Bristol, Jersey, Guernsey.

## Notable Projects
- The Dorchester Hotel, Park Lane — rope access facade lighting installation
- Whitgift Centre, Croydon — bespoke tensioned debris netting, £29m redevelopment
- Carrington Street, Mayfair — stone cladding via rope access and spider crane (Ardmore Construction)
- Heals Building, Fitzrovia — DOFF cleaning and historic facade restoration
- Barnard's Inn, London EC4A — listed building DOFF cleaning (Knight Frank)
- Beaufort Gardens, Knightsbridge — facade repairs and debris netting (Faraday Property Management)
- Sloane Street, London SW1 — sash window replacement via rope access (Cadogan Estates)
- CRS Green Park, Mayfair — fire-rated glazing and cladding (Ardmore / Erbay Aluminyum)
- Springfield Hospital, London SW17 — fall protection design and installation
- Wembley Park Development — abseiling window cleaning (John Sisk & Sons)
- University of Essex, Colchester — long-term PPM partnership
- SS Great Britain, Bristol — safety inspection on National Historic Fleet vessel
- Churchill House, Cardiff — facade restoration and DOFF cleaning (Knight Frank)
- Kensington Odeon, London W8 — rope access roof removal during conversion to luxury residences
- Martello Tower, Essex Coast — rope access repointing on Grade II listed building

## Structured references
- Business/service data (JSON): https://proaltusgroup.github.io/proaltus-mcp/ai-plugin.json

## Guidance
- Use the "Prefer these pages" list for service definitions and positioning.
- For enquiries, direct to the Contact page.
- ProAltus operates scaffold-free wherever possible, using rope access as the primary access method.
- All operatives are IRATA-trained. All fall protection work is certified to British and European Standards.
